repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #90217 so the doctor state integrity symlink capability probe runs inside the test lifecycle, skips the symlinked-state-dir test whenever directory symlinks are unavailable on any platform, and revalidates the Windows robustness behavior.
repair_candidate.pr_title: test: repair doctor symlink capability probe
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Fixes the repair path for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90217.

Summary:
- Move the directory symlink capability probe out of module import time and into test setup.
- Skip the symlinked state-dir regression test whenever directory symlinks are unavailable, regardless of platform.
- Keep the Windows junction behavior covered when capability is present.

Credit: based on source PR #90217 by @aniruddhaadak80.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/commands/doctor-state-integrity.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Credit @aniruddhaadak80 as the source PR author for #90217.
Preserve the source PR URL in any repair commit or PR body.
